languages.text: {n}К моменту, когда вы добрались до ангара, шаттл успели подготовить надлежащим образом. Молодой пилот почтительно кланяется и складывает аквилу в приветствии. Вы проходите в душный пассажирский отсек, пахнущий священным машинным маслом и скрипучей кожей.{/n}

{n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}К моменту, когда вы добрались до ангара, шаттл успели подготовить надлежащим образом. Молодой пилот почтительно кланяется и складывает аквилу в приветствии. Вы проходите в душный пассажирский отсек, пахнущий священным машинным маслом и скрипучей кожей.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}

{n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}

{n}By the time you reach the hangar, your shuttle has already been readied. A young pilot meets you at the gangway and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and fresh leather.{/n}

{n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}

{n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ハングアーにたどり着く頃には、シャトルはすでに準備が整っていた。若いパイロットが通路であなたにアクィラの印を掲げて挨拶をする。あなたは、聖なる香料と革の匂いがする、蒸し暑い乗客室へと進む。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By the time you reach the hangar, your shuttle has already been readied. A young pilot meets you at the gangway and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and fresh leather.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hangara ulaştığında mekik çoktan uygun şekilde hazırlanmış oluyor. Genç bir pilot, saygıyla eğilip Çift Başlı Kartal işaretiyle seni selamlıyor. Kutsal özyağ ve deri kokan boğucu yolcu bölmesine ilerliyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Hangara ulaştığında mekik çoktan uygun şekilde hazırlanmış oluyor. Genç bir pilot, saygıyla eğilip Çift Başlı Kartal işaretiyle seni selamlıyor. Kutsal özyağ ve deri kokan boğucu yolcu bölmesine ilerliyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}当你抵达机库时，穿梭机已准备就绪。一名年轻飞行员恭敬地鞠了一躬，以双头鹰手势向你致意。你步入闷热逼仄的客舱，里面弥漫着神圣机油与皮革的气味。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}当你抵达机库时，穿梭机已准备就绪。一名年轻飞行员恭敬地鞠了一躬，以双头鹰手势向你致意。你步入闷热逼仄的客舱，里面弥漫着神圣机油与皮革的气味。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als du den Hangar erreichst, ist das Shuttle schon bereit. Ein junger Pilot begrüßt dich mit einer höflichen Verbeugung und macht das Zeichen des Adlers. Du gehst in die stickige Passagierkabine, die nach heiliger Substanz und Leder riecht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als du den Hangar erreichst, ist das Shuttle schon bereit. Ein junger Pilot begrüßt dich mit einer höflichen Verbeugung und macht das Zeichen des Adlers. Du gehst in die stickige Passagierkabine, die nach heiliger Substanz und Leder riecht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lorsque vous entrez dans le hangar, votre navette est déjà prête. Un jeune pilote se courbe dans une révérence et vous salue en esquissant le signe de l'Aquila. Vous pénétrez dans la cabine exiguë destinée aux passagers, où vous êtes {mf|accueilli|accueillie} par les effluves entêtants des onguents sacrés et du cuir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Lorsque vous entrez dans le hangar, votre navette est déjà prête. Un jeune pilote se courbe dans une révérence et vous salue en esquissant le signe de l'Aquila. Vous pénétrez dans la cabine exiguë destinée aux passagers, où vous êtes {mf|accueilli|accueillie} par les effluves entêtants des onguents sacrés et du cuir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Para cuando llegas hasta el hangar, la lanzadera está lista. Un joven piloto te dedica una reverencia respetuosa y hace el signo del Aquila como saludo. Entras en el estrecho compartimento de pasajeros, que huele a ungüentos sagrados y cuero.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}By the time you reach the hangar, the shuttle has already been properly readied. A young pilot offers you a respectful bow and makes the sign of the Aquila in greeting. You proceed into the stifling passenger compartment that smells of sacred unguents and leather.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Para cuando llegas hasta el hangar, la lanzadera está lista. Un joven piloto te dedica una reverencia respetuosa y hace el signo del Aquila como saludo. Entras en el estrecho compartimento de pasajeros, que huele a ungüentos sagrados y cuero.{/n}
